project_metadata.report_title: Project Status and Release Readiness Executive Audit Report (V2 Corrected)
project_metadata.auditor_role: Senior Technical Program Manager & Software Delivery Auditor
project_metadata.status_summary: The PMS Dashboard core product capabilities, user interface, PostgreSQL database schema, containerization, and frontend test suites are highly mature and feature-complete. However, release is classified as AT RISK due to three critical blocking items: (1) Mandatory SEC-01 Git history secret sanitization and credential rotation before public/production deployment, (2) 5 failing Pytest backend unit tests on main branch HEAD, and (3) Formal FAIL closure on Report Builder Phase 1 requiring resolution of data calculation parity and zero-target null handling.

internal_demo_readiness.summary: Ready for internal demonstration today using live UI, 13 teams, BSC, Strategy Map, and mock datasets.

controlled_pilot_readiness.summary: Targeted for Aug 15–25, 2026 with 3 initial teams (Inbound, Outbound, Pre-Approvals IP Offshore). Blocked by SEC-01 Git cleanup.

uat_readiness.summary: Targeted for Aug 21, 2026. Requires staging VPS deployment and user account provisioning.

production_readiness.summary: Targeted for Sept 15, 2026. Blocked by SEC-01 secret rotation, Report Builder fixes, Celery async queues, and production host setup.

phases.completed_scope: Monorepo structure, FastAPI backend scaffolding, React 19 + Vite 8 frontend shell, setup scripts, env templates.
phases.verification_evidence: SYSTEM_AUDIT_REPORT.md, package.json, requirements.txt, clean build execution.

phases.completed_scope: PostgreSQL 15 schema v3.0, 31 Alembic migrations, range partitioning (2020-2030), RLS policies, materialized views.
phases.remaining_scope: Resolve 1 migration head test failure; staging DB migration dry-run.
phases.main_risk: Migration head test failure on main branch; staging DB dry-run pending.

phases.completed_scope: JWT session authentication, RBAC (Admin, Manager, Executive, Viewer), level-scoped team assignments (UserTeamAssignment), deactivation middleware.
phases.remaining_scope: Password renewal policy on first login for new staff.
phases.main_risk: Credential rotation needed for historical test accounts.

phases.completed_scope: Excel ingestion pipeline, single/multi-period processing, OLE/ZIP signature checks, file sanitization, Nginx 25MB limit.
phases.remaining_scope: Asynchronous background worker queue (Celery/RQ) for high-concurrency ingestion.
phases.main_risk: Large Excel uploads may lock API worker threads during concurrent user spikes.

phases.completed_scope: Config-driven onboarding for 13 teams (Backend/config/teams/*.json), versioned team configs, weight sum triggers (<= 1.0).
phases.remaining_scope: GUI-based team config editor for non-technical admins.
phases.main_risk: Invalid JSON configs bypassing manual schema validation if unvetted.

phases.completed_scope: Employee directory, historical performance profiles, KPI breakdown panels, uncapped achievement vs weight-capped contribution scoring.
phases.remaining_scope: Minor visual refinements on edge-case zero targets.

phases.completed_scope: Multi-period team filtering, roster view toggles, back-office vs call-center metrics, dynamic glassmorphic CustomDropdown.
Managerial & Corporate overview, manager selector bar, position hierarchy, real API snapshot integration.
4 strategic perspectives (Financial, Customer, Internal Process, Learning & Growth), management BSC config and snapshot persistence.
phases.remaining_scope: Historical BSC trend comparison over 12+ months.

phases.completed_scope: Strategic objective mapping across operational levels, position-based title resolution.
phases.remaining_scope: Interactive target node editing in UI.

phases.completed_scope: Insight drawer, canonical narrative engine, planning workspace (plans, milestones, action items, baseline/target tracking).
phases.remaining_scope: Persisted root cause register and feedback session workflow.
phases.main_risk: Unsaved planning context warning flows require UAT validation.

phases.completed_scope: 5-step story builder UI, 6 templates, dynamic department page expansion, 16:9 vector PDF export, draft auto-save.
phases.remaining_scope: Resolve Phase 1 Audit Blockers: canonical evidence sharing across Dashboard/Insights, zero-target null preservation, period-effective KPI config derivation.
phases.main_risk: Calculation semantic drift between Web UI and generated PDF reports.

phases.completed_scope: SEC-02 to SEC-08 resolved (CORS allowlist, upload security, Redis auth, 0 vulnerabilities).
phases.remaining_scope: SEC-01: Git history rewrite (Gitleaks/BFG) and mandatory credential rotation before public/production release.
phases.main_risk: Credentials exposed in historical Git commits.

phases.completed_scope: Multi-stage Dockerfiles (non-root execution), docker-compose.prod.yml, health probes (/api/health/liveness, /readiness), Nginx SPA/WebSocket proxy.
phases.remaining_scope: Multi-worker Gunicorn/Uvicorn scaling with Redis pub/sub adapter.
phases.main_risk: Single-worker bottleneck under high real-time WebSocket load.

phases.completed_scope: Pre-flight verification checklist, 13 team onboarding definitions, handover zip packages created.
phases.remaining_scope: Staging deployment, UAT user provisioning, test scripts execution with business stakeholders.
phases.main_risk: User adoption delays if UAT feedback loops are slow.

phases.completed_scope: Deployment guide (VPS, Cloud PaaS, Compose), systemd service templates, Nginx SSL configs.
phases.remaining_scope: Production VPS provisioning, domain DNS mapping, SSL certbot execution, cron backup setup.
phases.main_risk: Environment configuration drift if production host is improperly tuned.

blockers_and_risks.risk: SEC-01: Sensitive Credentials in Historical Git Commits
blockers_and_risks.current_mitigation: Un-tracked sensitive JSON files from current HEAD. Hardened current codebase.
blockers_and_risks.required_action: Execute Git history rewrite using BFG/Gitleaks, rotate all database/JWT/Redis secrets, force-push sanitized main branch.
blockers_and_risks.effect_on_release: Blocks Production and Public Repository Release.

blockers_and_risks.risk: Report Builder Phase 1 Data Model & Calculation Discrepancies
blockers_and_risks.current_mitigation: Documented in REPORT_BUILDER_PHASE_1_CLOSURE.md with explicit failure items.
blockers_and_risks.required_action: Refactor Report Builder to consume canonical ReportingEvidenceService, preserve zero-target nulls, and enforce period-effective KPI config derivation.

blockers_and_risks.risk: 5 Failing Backend Pytest Unit Tests on Main Branch HEAD
blockers_and_risks.current_mitigation: Identified exact test tracebacks in test_kpi_contribution_capping.py, test_marketing_import.py, test_migration_graph.py.
blockers_and_risks.required_action: Fix 5 failing Pytest assertions on main branch to achieve 100% backend test suite green status.

blockers_and_risks.current_mitigation: Bounded chunk reads and 25MB Nginx upload limit enforced.
blockers_and_risks.required_action: Implement asynchronous background processing worker queue (Celery or Redis Queue) for Excel ingestion.

blockers_and_risks.current_mitigation: Alembic migrations verified on local PostgreSQL PMS_Sys.
blockers_and_risks.required_action: Run full migration dry-run on staging PostgreSQL instance before production release.

release_forecast.pilot_scope: 3 Targeted Teams: Inbound, Outbound, Pre-Approvals IP Offshore
release_forecast.confidence_reason: Confidence is low/conditional because staging VPS environment is unprovisioned, Git rewrite maintenance window is unapproved, and business UAT owners are unassigned.
critical_path: 1. SEC-01 Git History Rewrite & Secret Rotation [3 Working Days]
2. Fix 5 Failing Backend Pytest Unit Tests & Report Builder Phase 1 Data Model Refactoring [5 Working Days]
3. Staging VPS Setup & PostgreSQL Migration Dry-Run [2 Working Days]
4. Controlled UAT Execution with 3 Pilot Teams [10 Working Days]
5. Final Production Promotion & Full 13-Team Onboarding [15 Working Days]

next_48_hours: Approve SEC-01 Git history rewrite window and authorize credential rotation for DB/Redis/JWT.
Assign Backend Lead to resolve 5 failing Pytest unit tests and refactor Report Builder data model.
next_7_days: Execute BFG Repo-Cleaner / Gitleaks sweep on all branches.
Deploy staging environment on Ubuntu VPS with Docker Compose.
Run complete automated regression test suite on staging PostgreSQL.
before_pilot_uat: Provision UAT manager and executive accounts with level-scoped permissions.
Conduct UAT onboarding workshop for Inbound, Outbound, and Pre-Approvals team leads.
before_production: Implement Celery/Redis background worker queue for Excel uploads.
Configure automated daily PostgreSQL backups and offsite snapshot replication.
Setup SSL certificates and Nginx rate-limiting rules.

management_decisions_required.decision: Authorize SEC-01 Git History Rewrite & Credential Rotation
Approve Controlled Pilot Release Strategy (3 Initial Teams)
Allocate Staging & Production VPS Hosting Budget (Hetzner/AWS)
